headline: General Electric (GE) Stock After 333% Three-Year Surge Is It Too Late To Buy?
summary: If you are wondering whether General Electric stock still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price, this article breaks down what the current market is implying. General Electric recently closed at US$355.12, with returns of 3.8% over 7 days, 17.3% over 30 days, 10.7% year to date, 44.1% over 1 year and 333.1% over 3 years. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in large industrial and aerospace players, regulatory scrutiny...

headline: RBC initiates GE HealthCare as it sees AI-led innovation cycle driving growth
summary: Investing.com -- RBC Capital Markets initiated coverage of GE HealthCare Technologies with an Outperform rating and an $80 price target, arguing that the company's expanding portfolio of AI-enabled imaging, diagnostics and healthcare software products positions it for accelerating revenue and earnings growth over the next several years.

headline: 1 Mega-Cap Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore
summary: Megacap stocks dominate their sectors and their actions influence economies worldwide. The flip side though is that their sheer size means they have less room for explosive growth as scale works against them.
